title: Round 3 — the gate: three concepts, keep/kill/merge
prompt: The pool is distilled — time to triage. Round-Zero Board and Quiet Router are gone for good. These three are the syntheses of your keeps: A) Comprehensive Concierge Gallery — the basic flow plus as-many-questions-as-it-takes, with the recommendation quoting your answers back. B) Living Gallery, the real look — the actual screen, full-bleed: four live method cards seeded from the brief, mind map ribboned. C) Living Concierge — questions and live previews on one surface; each answer visibly reshuffles the gallery until the pick grows into the canvas. The gate: mark every option keep, kill, or merge. Merge-marked options become ONE synthesis next round. If one of these IS the flow we build, crown it Final — that triggers capture, the decision poster, and closeout hands you a loopable build plan for the mind-map board + intake work.

options.label: Comprehensive Concierge Gallery
options.description: The chosen flow with unbounded clarifying questions — the concierge asks as many as it takes, then the gallery's recommendation quotes your answers back.
